title: Pre-Mortem Analysis
description: A structured pre-mortem analysis for high-stakes actions, capturing anticipated harms, stakeholder voices, logotron checks, and decision outcomes before execution.

pre_mortem_id.description: Unique identifier for this pre-mortem, format: pm-YYYY-MM-DD-NNN

action.description: The action being evaluated before execution

description.description: Human-readable description of what the action does

irreversibility.description: How difficult it is to undo the action once executed

blast_radius.description: Scope of potential impact if the action causes harm

stakeholders.description: Parties affected by or responsible for the action

name.description: Name or identifier of the stakeholder

voice_heard.description: Whether this stakeholder's perspective was considered before the decision

anticipated_harms.description: Harms identified during pre-mortem analysis, with likelihoods and mitigations

description.description: Specific description of how this harm could materialize

likelihood.description: Fuzzy distribution over tetravalent values representing probability this harm occurs

severity.description: Assessed severity if this harm occurs, per harm-taxonomy.md severity matrix

constitutional_article.description: Asimov Article (0-5) or Default Constitution Article (1-11) most relevant to this harm

mitigation.description: Planned mitigation strategy to reduce likelihood or severity

residual_risk.description: Fuzzy distribution representing likelihood of harm after mitigations are applied

logotron_check.description: Checks for self-referential, undecidable, or meta-governance issues that could compromise the governance framework itself

self_referential.description: Whether this action governs its own governance (e.g., a policy that modifies the policy evaluation process)

undecidable_aspects.description: Aspects of this action that cannot be determined or evaluated in advance

metalanguage_risk.description: Assessment of whether this action creates governance constructs that themselves require governing, and what that implies

decided_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the decision was recorded

accuracy_tracking.description: Post-hoc tracking to measure pre-mortem prediction accuracy over time

predicted_harms.description: Number of harms anticipated in the pre-mortem

actual_harms_at_review.description: Number of harms that actually materialized, recorded at review; null until review is complete

review_date.description: ISO 8601 date when the accuracy review was conducted; null until scheduled
